title: Join the fun at RLR bazaar next weekend
description: GEORGE NEWS - The RLR retirement centre will...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - The RLR retirement centre will be holding a bazaar on Saturday 5 April at the centre in De La Fontaine Street.


> Members of the public are welcome to join in a lovely morning of shopping and fun.


Visitors will be able to browse a variety of offerings, including the White Elephant table, lovely jewellery and clothing.

There will be bargains galore to choose from and food stalls and a tea room will provide some delicious fare.

The bazaar starts at 08:00 and concludes at 11:00.

For more information, phone the RLR on 044-874 7494.

‘Ons bring jou die nuutste Tuinroete, Hessequa, Karoo nuus’
